ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully readable. Contains both ORIGINAL (page 1) and COPY (page 2) versions, plus embedded proforma invoice (pages 3-4). Using ORIGINAL certificate from page 1.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clear and fully readable. 2 pages. Invoice number 0001701171. Issued by Wellspect AB.

lc_check.lc_validation_notes: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-448717' does not contain any LC-related terminology as a separate field label. Proceeding with full verification.

locations_found: Invoice file, page 2: 'Wellspect Healthcare' appears in the signatory block: 'Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB'
Invoice file, page 1: 'Wellspect' appears as header/branding at top right of page
consignor_search_result.notes: The name 'Wellspect Healthcare' is explicitly found on page 2 of the invoice file. The invoice issuer is 'Wellspect AB' (shown in footer and office block), and 'Wellspect Healthcare' is explicitly named alongside 'Wellspect AB' in the signatory declaration on page 2.

pairing_validation.notes: Certificate references Proforma 0001701171, which matches invoice number 0001701171 in the invoice file. Consignor 'Wellspect Healthcare' is identifiable in the invoice (via signatory block and branding). Consignee 'Paracare SpA' is identifiable in the invoice (Delivery Address). All three criteria met.

candidates.raw_text: Las Dalias #3072 - Macul, 7810864 Santiago de Chile, Chile
candidates.normalized_text: las dalias #3072 - macul, 7810864 santiago de chile, chile

candidates.raw_text: PARACARE SpA, Las Dalias 3072, Macul 1 Santiago, 7810864 Santiago de Chile
candidates.normalized_text: paracare spa, las dalias 3072, macul 1 santiago, 7810864 santiago de chile

candidates.source: Invoice page 1, Country of orig column
Invoice page 1, header area — field label present but no name/address filled in

consignor.certificate_value: Wellspect Healthcare, P.O Box 14, 431 21, Mölndal, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Wellspect AB (issuer, footer), Wellspect Healthcare (signatory block, page 2), Wellspect (branding), PO BOX 14, SE-431 21 Mölndal, SWEDEN

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Wellspect Healthcare' anywhere in the invoice file.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND. 'Wellspect Healthcare' appears explicitly on invoice page 2 in the signatory block: 'Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB'. This is an explicit occurrence of the certificate's consignor name in the invoice document.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignor country: Sweden. Invoice issuer country: SWEDEN (footer). Also SE-prefix in VAT number SE559332067301 confirms Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name 'Wellspect Healthcare' found explicitly in invoice signatory block on page 2.

consignor.motivation: The certificate's consignor is 'Wellspect Healthcare' in Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'Wellspect AB' (a different legal entity name) at the same address (PO Box 14, SE-431 21 Mölndal, Sweden). However, per rule 4.1.0, the name 'Wellspect Healthcare' appears EXPLICITLY in the invoice on page 2 in the signatory block ('Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB'). Additionally, 'Wellspect' appears as the branding name at the top of the invoice. Since 'Wellspect Healthcare' is explicitly identifiable in the invoice document, the consignor verification passes. Country: Sweden in certificate matches SWEDEN in invoice footer and SE-prefix in VAT number. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Wellspect Healthcare, P.O Box 14, 431 21, Mölndal, Sweden'. Invoice text: Footer shows 'Wellspect AB, PO BOX 14, SE-431 21 Mölndal, SWEDEN'. Page 2 signatory block shows 'Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB'. Rule 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur) applied: the exact string 'Wellspect Healthcare' found in invoice page 2. Land verified via explicit 'SWEDEN' in footer and SE-prefix in VAT NO.SE559332067301. No sequential testing of 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6 needed since 4.1.0 gives MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: Paracare SpA, Las Dalias #3072 - Macul, 7810864 Santiago de Chile, Chile
consignee.invoice_value: PARACARE SpA, Las Dalias 3072, Macul 1 Santiago, 7810864 Santiago de Chile (Delivery Address)

comparison_steps.description: Check for primary billing fields (Invoice to, Bill to, Sold to, Buyer). The invoice has an 'Invoice recipient' field label on page 1 but it appears to be EMPTY — no name or address is filled in under this label. The 'Delivery Address' field contains 'PARACARE SpA' with full address.
comparison_steps.result: The primary billing field 'Invoice recipient' exists as a label but contains no data. Since the primary billing field is empty/blank, the fallback to the Delivery Address field is applicable per rule 4.2.1.1.
comparison_steps.outcome: Proceed to verify against Delivery Address

comparison_steps.description: Since the Invoice recipient field is empty, the Delivery Address is used as fallback. Certificate consignee: 'Paracare SpA'. Invoice Delivery Address: 'PARACARE SpA'.
comparison_steps.result: Name matches after normalization (paracare spa = paracare spa). Address: Certificate has 'Las Dalias #3072 - Macul, 7810864 Santiago de Chile, Chile'. Invoice has 'Las Dalias 3072, Macul 1 Santiago, 7810864 Santiago de Chile'. Minor formatting differences (#3072 vs 3072, Macul vs Macul 1 Santiago) — these are address formatting variations, not contradictions.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate consignee country: Chile. Invoice Delivery Address includes '7810864 Santiago de Chile' — 'Chile' is identifiable as the country. The postal code 7810864 is a Chilean postal code format.
comparison_steps.result: Chile identified in invoice delivery address. Country MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification. Invoice recipient field exists as label but is empty/blank. Fallback to Delivery Address applied.
Alternative recipient address – Delivery Address used since primary billing field is empty.
Consignee MATCH – company name identifiable and country matches. Address differences (# symbol, formatting) do not affect outcome per 4.2.4.

consignee.motivation: The certificate's consignee is 'Paracare SpA' in Chile. The invoice has an 'Invoice recipient' field label but it is empty. The 'Delivery Address' field shows 'PARACARE SpA, Las Dalias 3072, Macul 1 Santiago, 7810864 Santiago de Chile'. Per rule 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.1.1, when the primary billing field is empty, the Delivery Address serves as fallback. Company name 'Paracare SpA' matches 'PARACARE SpA' after case normalization. Country Chile is identifiable from 'Santiago de Chile' in the address. Per rule 4.2.4, address differences (#3072 vs 3072, Macul vs Macul 1 Santiago) are formatting variations and do not constitute MISMATCH. MATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Paracare SpA, Las Dalias #3072 - Macul, 7810864 Santiago de Chile, Chile'. Invoice text: 'PARACARE SpA, Las Dalias 3072, Macul 1 Santiago, 7810864 Santiago de Chile'. Invoice recipient field is present as a label but empty. Used Delivery Address as fallback per 4.2.1.1. Name normalized: 'paracare spa' = 'paracare spa'. Country: Chile present in both. Rule 4.2.4 states address differences (gatuadress, postnummer) shall NOT cause MISMATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Pro Forma Invoice 0001701171 dated 29th of January 2026; items: Rectal Catheter Set Regular 80, Rectal Catheter Set Small 80, Classic System Regular ES, Classic System Small ES, Navina Tube Set 80

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers. The certificate does not list specific article/item numbers for the goods. It uses a generell description 'Medical Equipment' with a reference to proforma invoice.
comparison_steps.result: No article numbers in certificate. Proceed to Prioritet 2/3.

comparison_steps.description: The certificate states 'Medical Equipment (According to Proforma 0001701171 dated 260129'. This is a general goods description with an explicit reference to a proforma invoice number and date. The expression 'According to Proforma' constitutes an explicit reference to the invoice (equivalent to 'as per invoice').
comparison_steps.result: Invoice reference: '0001701171' matches invoice number '0001701171'. Date: '260129' → interpreted as 2026-01-29 (YYMMDD format). Invoice date: '29th of January 2026' → 2026-01-29. Dates match. The invoice content (medical catheters and systems) is consistent with 'Medical Equipment'. All conditions for 4.3.5 are met.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that the invoice content is consistent with 'Medical Equipment'. Invoice items are: Rectal Catheter Set, Classic System, Navina Tube Set — all with HS codes 90183900 and 90189084 (medical instruments). These are clearly medical equipment.
comparison_steps.result: Invoice content is fully consistent with 'Medical Equipment' description.

rules_applied.description: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens – certificate uses general description 'Medical Equipment' with explicit reference 'According to Proforma 0001701171 dated 260129'. Invoice number and date match. Invoice content is consistent with the general description.

goods_description.motivation: The certificate uses a generell goods description 'Medical Equipment' with an explicit invoice reference: 'According to Proforma 0001701171 dated 260129'. Per rule 4.3.5, a general description is accepted when the certificate simultaneously provides an invoice number, date, and an explicit reference to the invoice. Here: (1) Invoice number '0001701171' matches exactly. (2) Date '260129' = 2026-01-29, which matches the invoice date '29th of January 2026'. (3) 'According to Proforma' constitutes an explicit invoice reference. (4) The invoice content (Rectal Catheter Sets, Classic Systems, Navina Tube Set — all medical instruments with HS codes 9018xxxx) is fully consistent with 'Medical Equipment'. No article numbers are listed in the certificate, so Priority 1 is not applicable. All conditions met → MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate text: 'Medical Equipment (According to Proforma 0001701171 dated 260129'. Invoice number: '0001701171' — exact match. Invoice date: '29th of January 2026' = 2026-01-29. Certificate date reference '260129' parsed as YYMMDD = 2026-01-29 — exact match. Expression 'According to Proforma' = explicit invoice reference per 4.3.5. Invoice items are medical devices (HS 9018), consistent with 'Medical Equipment'. Rule 4.3.5 fully satisfied.

quantity.invoice_value: Line quantities: 20 + 10 + 2 + 1 + 2 = 35 (sum of all line items)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7 contains '35pcs'. This is the verification quantity. Numeric value: 35, unit: pcs.
Search for the value '35' as a total quantity in the invoice. The invoice does not have a total quantity line showing '35'. Individual line quantities are 20, 10, 2, 1, 2.
comparison_steps.result: Value '35' not found as explicit total in invoice. Proceed to undantag.

comparison_steps.description: Quantity is in pcs, not weight units. Not applicable.
Not applicable — not a weight-per-piece scenario.

comparison_steps.step: 4.4.5.5 – Undantag 3D (Summering flera rader inom samma faktura)
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states total 35 pcs. Invoice has 5 lines: 20 + 10 + 2 + 1 + 2 = 35 pcs. All lines are in the same invoice (0001701171). All quantities are in the same implied unit (pieces). Applying 4.4.5.5.1 (generell/samlande varubeskrivning): Certificate uses 'Medical Equipment' as a general description covering all items. Each invoice line is a medical equipment variant (catheters, systems, tube sets). All lines belong to the same product family (medical equipment/devices). Sum: 20+10+2+1+2 = 35. Certificate value: 35. Exact match (within 0 tolerance).
comparison_steps.result: Sum of line quantities 35 = certificate quantity 35. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Undantag 3D – Summering av flera rader inom samma faktura. 5 lines summed: 20+10+2+1+2 = 35 pcs = certificate value 35 pcs.
Generell/samlande varubeskrivning – certificate uses 'Medical Equipment' covering all invoice lines (medical devices). All lines share same product family.

quantity.motivation: The certificate states 35pcs in box 7. The invoice does not have an explicit total quantity field but contains 5 line items with quantities: 20, 10, 2, 1, 2. Per Undantag 3D (rule 4.4.5.5), summation of multiple rows within the same invoice is allowed when: (1) Certificate states a total quantity — yes, 35pcs. (2) Invoice has multiple rows whose quantities together equal the total — yes, 20+10+2+1+2=35. (3) All rows belong to the same invoice (0001701171) — yes. (4) Same unit on all rows — yes, all are pieces. (5) No irrelevant rows included — all 5 lines are medical devices matching the certificate description. (6) Per 4.4.5.5.1, the certificate uses 'Medical Equipment' as a general description, and all invoice lines are variants of medical equipment. (7) Sum 35 = 35, exact match within tolerance. All conditions satisfied → MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '35pcs' → 35 pcs. Invoice line quantities: Line 1: 20, Line 2: 10, Line 3: 2, Line 4: 1, Line 5: 2. Sum: 35. No explicit total quantity row in invoice. Undantag 3D applied. All 5 lines are medical devices consistent with 'Medical Equipment'. Sum matches exactly. Rule 4.4.5.5 conditions fully met.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Country of Origin: Sweden (page 2 declaration); SE per line item (page 1, Country of orig column)

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin declaration in invoice. Page 2 contains 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Page 1 contains 'Country of orig' column with 'SE' for all 5 lines.
comparison_steps.result: Origin explicitly stated as 'Sweden' on page 2 and 'SE' (ISO country code for Sweden) per line on page 1.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice page 2: 'Sweden'. Invoice page 1: 'SE'. SE is the ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden. All representations refer to Sweden.
comparison_steps.result: Sweden = Sweden = SE. Exact match after normalization.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via explicit 'Country of Origin: Sweden' declaration on page 2 and 'SE' per-line codes on page 1.
Normalization of country names: Sweden = SE (ISO alpha-2).
Origin country Sweden explicitly identified in invoice. MATCH.

country_of_origin.motivation: The certificate states origin as 'Sweden' in box 3. The invoice explicitly declares 'Country of Origin: Sweden' on page 2 and lists 'SE' (ISO alpha-2 code for Sweden) for every line item in the 'Country of orig' column on page 1. After normalization, Sweden = Sweden = SE. Single origin country, unambiguous. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'Sweden'. Invoice page 2 declaration: 'Country of Origin: Sweden' — exact text match. Invoice page 1 column: 'SE' for all 5 lines — SE is ISO alpha-2 for Sweden. Rule 4.5.4 allows ISO code normalization. No mixed origins, no ambiguity. Straightforward MATCH.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable – no LC reference found in certificate
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate number is 'SEG-26D-448717'. No 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar banking term found.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Document A (Certificate of Origin) contains pages 1-2 (ORIGINAL + COPY certificates) and pages 3-4 (embedded proforma invoice). Document B (Invoice) contains pages 1-2 (proforma invoice). Per rule 8.5.0, certificate from file 1 (page 1 ORIGINAL) and invoice from file 2 (pages 1-2).
rule_evaluation_log.details: The embedded invoice in the certificate file (pages 3-4) is NOT used for verification per rule 8.5.0. Invoice file (Document B) is the independent verification document.

Criterion 1: Certificate references Proforma 0001701171 = invoice number 0001701171. Criterion 2: Consignor 'Wellspect Healthcare' found in invoice signatory block. Criterion 3: Consignee 'Paracare SpA' found in invoice Delivery Address.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 'Wellspect Healthcare' found explicitly in invoice page 2 signatory block
rule_evaluation_log.details: Consignor name found; sequential testing of 4.1.3.1-4.1.3.6 not required.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice footer: SWEDEN. VAT prefix: SE.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Primary billing field 'Invoice recipient' is empty; fallback to Delivery Address
rule_evaluation_log.details: Invoice has 'Invoice recipient' label but no data under it.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – Paracare SpA found in Delivery Address
rule_evaluation_log.details: Primary billing field empty, so Delivery Address is valid fallback.
Certificate: Chile. Invoice: Santiago de Chile.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – invoice number, date, and explicit reference all verified
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: 'According to Proforma 0001701171 dated 260129'. Invoice: number 0001701171, date 2026-01-29. Content consistent with 'Medical Equipment'.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Undantag 3D – summering flera rader samma faktura
rule_evaluation_log.details: All 5 lines from same invoice, same unit (pcs), all medical equipment variants. Exact sum match.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Found – 'Country of Origin: Sweden' on page 2, 'SE' per line on page 1

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignor MISMATCH because certificate says 'Wellspect Healthcare' but invoice issuer is 'Wellspect AB'
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.1.0 (koncernstruktur), 'Wellspect Healthcare' appears explicitly in the invoice file on page 2 in the signatory block ('Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB'). The name is expressly identifiable in the invoice, so the consignor is verified.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee MISMATCH because 'Invoice recipient' field is empty and there is no buyer identified
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.2.0.2 and 4.2.1.1, when the primary billing field is empty, the Delivery Address serves as fallback. Paracare SpA is clearly identified in the Delivery Address with matching country.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Goods description MISMATCH because 'Medical Equipment' does not match specific item descriptions (Rectal Catheter Set, etc.)
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per rule 4.3.5, a general goods description is accepted when the certificate provides an explicit invoice reference with matching number and date. The certificate says 'According to Proforma 0001701171 dated 260129' — both number and date match the invoice. The invoice content (medical devices) is consistent with 'Medical Equipment'.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Quantity MISMATCH because '35' is not found as an explicit total in the invoice
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Per Undantag 3D (rule 4.4.5.5), summation of multiple rows within the same invoice is allowed. Lines sum to 20+10+2+1+2=35, exactly matching the certificate. All conditions met.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Wellspect Healthcare kan identifieras i fakturan, mottagaren Paracare SpA återfinns i leveransadressen, varubeskrivningen 'Medical Equipment' styrks av fakturareferensen, den totala kvantiteten 35 stycken bekräftas av fakturans radsummor, och ursprungslandet Sverige anges explicit i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_notes: Strong document pair with clear matching across all checkpoints. Certificate uses general goods description with explicit proforma invoice reference which matches. Consignor verified via explicit name occurrence in invoice signatory block (koncernstruktur rule 4.1.0). Quantity verified via line summation (Undantag 3D). Origin explicitly confirmed in both per-line codes and separate declaration.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.document_pair: Certificate SEG-26D-448717 vs Pro Forma Invoice 0001701171

sections.certificate_value: Wellspect Healthcare, P.O Box 14, 431 21, Mölndal, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Wellspect AB, PO BOX 14, SE-431 21 Mölndal, SWEDEN (issuer); 'Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB' (signatory block page 2)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor name explicitly found in invoice signatory block
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'Wellspect Healthcare' återfinns explicit i fakturans underteckningsblock på sida 2 ('Wellspect Healthcare Wellspect AB'). Land Sverige bekräftas i fakturans adressblock och via VAT-nummer med SE-prefix. MATCH.

sections.certificate_value: Paracare SpA, Las Dalias #3072 - Macul, 7810864 Santiago de Chile, Chile
sections.invoice_value: PARACARE SpA, Las Dalias 3072, Macul 1 Santiago, 7810864 Santiago de Chile (Delivery Address)
sections.rule_applied: Alternativ mottagaradress (4.2.1.1) – primary billing field empty, Delivery Address used as fallback
sections.motivation: Fakturans fält 'Invoice recipient' saknar uppgifter. Leveransadress används som fallback. 'Paracare SpA' matchar 'PARACARE SpA' efter normalisering. Land Chile identifieras i 'Santiago de Chile'. Adressformatering skiljer sig marginellt (#3072 vs 3072) men detta är tillåten variation. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Pro Forma Invoice 0001701171, dated 29th of January 2026; Rectal Catheter Sets, Classic Systems, Navina Tube Set
sections.rule_applied: Generell varubeskrivning med fakturareferens (4.3.5) – invoice number and date match, content consistent
sections.motivation: Certifikatet använder generell beskrivning 'Medical Equipment' med explicit hänvisning till Proforma 0001701171 daterat 260129 (=2026-01-29). Fakturanummer överensstämmer exakt. Datum överensstämmer exakt. Fakturans innehåll (medicinska katetrar och system med HS-koder 9018xxxx) är förenligt med 'Medical Equipment'. MATCH.

sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3D – Summering av flera rader inom samma faktura (4.4.5.5)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 35 styck i ruta 7. Fakturan saknar en totalkvantitetsrad men innehåller 5 artikelrader: 20+10+2+1+2=35. Alla rader tillhör samma faktura, samma enhet (styck), och samma produktfamilj (medicinsk utrustning). Summan 35 matchar certifikatets 35 exakt. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Country of Origin: Sweden (page 2); SE per line (page 1)
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger Sverige som ursprungsland. Fakturan bekräftar detta explicit via 'Country of Origin: Sweden' på sida 2 och 'SE' (ISO-kod för Sverige) per artikelrad på sida 1. Exakt överensstämmelse. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 applicable checkpoints are MATCH. Lowest checkpoint confidence is 0.92 (quantity), above the 0.85 floor for IDENTICAL. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH checkpoints. workflow_recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
